message:
fix(widgets): correct LOUDS tree degree() computation

The degree() method was using an incorrect algorithm that mapped through
rank1/select0 to find child blocks instead of counting 1-bits in the
node's own LOUDS block. Fixed to use the correct formula:
degree(v) = select0(v+1) - select0(v) - 1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
